docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEDHURST, NIGEL AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA AND INDIVIDUAL DBA LAW OFFICES OF PATRICIA BARLOW JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
